flows.name: live_bot_uptime
flows.note: 31 consecutive successful ticks (3.5h) before container restart

flows.name: live_bot_trade_quality
flows.note: Need 50+ candles for walk-forward Sharpe. Currently ~42 candles. Target: positive Sharpe on out-of-sample data

flows.name: bot_self_improvement
flows.note: Bot has self-improving prompt but hasn't hit iteration 40 meta-cycle yet. Target: 1+ successful code mutation backtested and promoted/discarded

flows.name: vault_security_hardening
flows.note: 0/3 hardening contracts deployed: governance whitelist, admin timelock, approval restriction

evolveHistory: Gen7 complete. Bot operational (31+ ticks). Self-improving prompt deployed. Vault hardening planned.

metricClaims.live_bot_uptime: Continuous uptime proves the E2E pipeline (operator→sidecar→AI→API→vault) is production-viable
metricClaims.live_bot_trade_quality: Positive walk-forward Sharpe means the bot's strategy generalizes to unseen market data, not just curve-fitting
metricClaims.bot_self_improvement: If the bot writes and validates its own code mutations, it can improve without human intervention — the core product value
metricClaims.vault_security_hardening: Users won't deposit real funds without governance-controlled target whitelists and admin timelocks
